title: rubus villicaulis var. rectangulatus
intro: Rubus villicaulis var. rectangulatus, also known as the Himalayan blackberry, is a variety of the Himalayan raspberry plant that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus villicaulis var. rectangulatus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
